description:
Automated translation (refer to source for accuracy)

On May 2 (Saturday), I attended the Reiwa 8 (2026) Annual General Meeting of the Hanno City International Exchange Association, held at the Hanno City Civic Activities Center.

I offer my sincere thanks to the members of the Hanno City International Exchange Association for serving as the core of international exchange in our city. We look forward to your continued support as we work toward realizing a multicultural coexistence society.

Source (Japanese): https://www.city.hanno.lg.jp/shiseijoho/shichoshitsu/shichoblog/shisei2026/shisei202605/13533.html
summary: 📝 Mayor: Hanno City International Exchange Association Annual General Meeting, Reiwa 8
